experiment_name: Standard Proposal Prompt vs Outcome-Oriented Prompt

proposal.introduction: Hi, I’m Kartik Bansal, an AI Product Engineer and full-stack developer. I understand you need a responsive operations dashboard for a logistics company with KPI visibility (delivery, delay, driver, warehouse) from an existing REST API, using React, Tailwind CSS, JWT auth, KPI cards, filterable tables, charts, and mobile layouts. With hands-on experience building analytics dashboards in React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS integrated with REST APIs, I’m well-positioned to deliver this efficiently within your 12-day timeline and budget.
proposal.relevantExperience: I’ve built two directly relevant analytics dashboards: an Analytics Dashboard where I designed React UI, KPI cards, and charts connected to a Python analytics API for business metrics; and an Interactive Analytics Dashboard using React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS with KPI visualization, workflow tracking, and reusable component architecture. Both prove my ability to deliver responsive, filterable, KPI-driven dashboards from APIs—exactly what your logistics managers need.
proposal.approach: 1. Review your existing REST API and JWT auth flow to map endpoints for delivery, delay, driver, and warehouse data. 2. Build reusable React + Tailwind components: KPI cards, filterable tables, delivery charts, mobile layouts. 3. Integrate API with JWT-secured requests and dynamic filtering. 4. Implement responsive design and verify on mobile. 5. Write setup documentation and deliver codebase with a brief walkthrough.
proposal.timeline: I can complete this in 12 days: days 1–2 API/JWT setup, days 3–8 component build and integration, days 9–10 mobile/charts polish, days 11–12 docs and testing.
proposal.pricing: My fixed price is $900. This matches your budget and reflects a focused, component-based build using proven dashboard experience without scope creep.

strengths: Clear introduction with relevant skills and understanding of requirements
Specific relevant experience with two past dashboard projects
Structured approach and realistic 12-day timeline
Fixed pricing aligned with stated budget
improvements: Personalization could include client or company name if known
Add brief mention of testing strategy or post-delivery support
Tone is slightly formal but could be more engaging

proposal.introduction: Hi, I’m Kartik Bansal, an AI Product Engineer and full-stack developer with strong React and Figma-to-code experience. I understand you need a pixel-accurate React website for a B2B cybersecurity consultancy: five accessible, responsive marketing pages, a case-study template, and a fast mobile experience. With my background in building responsive React interfaces from design handoffs and reusable component architecture, I’m confident I can deliver a clean, accessible, and SEO-friendly site within your 8-day timeline.
proposal.relevantExperience: In a past Interactive Analytics Dashboard project, I converted design requirements into a responsive React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS frontend with reusable components and clear API integration. That work strengthened my ability to build modular, responsive UI from Figma-style handoffs—directly relevant to your need for reusable page sections, accessible navigation, and a fast mobile experience across marketing pages and a case-study template.
proposal.approach: 1. Review Figma files and map sections into reusable React components. 2. Build accessible, responsive layouts with semantic HTML and SEO tags. 3. Implement contact form with validation and accessible inputs. 4. Assemble five marketing pages and case-study template using shared sections. 5. Optimize mobile performance and run accessibility checks. 6. Deliver codebase with clear documentation and final review.
proposal.timeline: I can complete the full build and revisions in 8 days, aligning with your stated timeline and allowing time for feedback.
proposal.pricing: My fixed price is $600, matching your budget. This covers Figma conversion, five responsive pages, case-study template, accessibility, and SEO-friendly markup based on the defined scope.

strengths: Clear structure with intro, experience, approach, timeline, pricing
Directly addresses client requirements and constraints
Confident and respectful tone throughout
improvements: Include specific client or project name for stronger personalization
Add brief mention of testing tools or accessibility standards used
Consider linking portfolio or past project evidence

proposal.introduction: Hi! I’m Kartik Bansal, an AI Product Engineer and full-stack developer. I read your need for a high-converting Next.js landing page for a personal-finance app with product storytelling, beta sign-up capture, animations, mobile performance, and SEO-ready metadata. With my experience building responsive React + TypeScript + Tailwind interfaces and AI product frontends, I can deliver a polished, Lighthouse-conscious page within your 9-day timeline and $700 budget.
proposal.relevantExperience: I built an Interactive Analytics Dashboard using React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS with responsive layouts and reusable components, directly relevant to your mobile-first and performance needs. I also developed the AI Freelancer Proposal Assistant frontend in React + TypeScript, focusing on clean UX and modular architecture. While those used React/Vite, my frontend skills transfer seamlessly to Next.js, and I’ve integrated waitlist-style forms and semantic structures in past full-stack work.
proposal.approach: 1. Set up Next.js + Tailwind CSS with Framer Motion and semantic SEO metadata. 2. Design product storytelling sections with responsive layout and animations. 3. Build beta waitlist form with validation and backend/API capture. 4. Optimize images, code, and mobile performance for Lighthouse. 5. Test across devices and deliver source with documentation.
proposal.timeline: I can complete the landing page in 9 days: days 1-2 setup/design, 3-5 build, 6-7 animations/SEO, 8 testing, 9 polish and handoff.
proposal.pricing: My fixed price is $700. This matches your budget and covers end-to-end design, development, SEO, and performance optimization for a conversion-focused MVP landing page.

strengths: Clearly references client's specific requirements
Structured approach with timeline and pricing
Relevant experience mapped to project needs
improvements: Slightly informal opening tone ('Hi!')
Could show direct Next.js examples instead of React/Vite
Mention post-delivery support or revisions

proposal.introduction: Hi, I’m Kartik Bansal, an AI Product Engineer and full-stack developer specializing in FastAPI and Python. I reviewed your need for secure, multi-tenant REST APIs for an appointment-booking product with JWT auth, role-based access, and booking-conflict handling. With hands-on experience building booking platforms and production-grade FastAPI backends, I can deliver documented, tested APIs within your 18-day timeline and $1,300 budget.
proposal.relevantExperience: I built a Smart Turf Booking Platform as a full-stack developer where I designed REST APIs and a React-FastAPI-SQL architecture for scheduling, booking management, and admin controls—directly relevant to your slots, staff, and booking endpoints. I also developed the AI Freelancer Proposal Assistant using FastAPI with a layered service/repository pattern, SQLAlchemy, SQLite, and OpenAPI-style structure, proving my ability to create modular, validated, and well-documented Python APIs with clean architecture.
proposal.approach: 1. Set up FastAPI project with PostgreSQL and Alembic migrations for multi-tenant schema. 2. Implement JWT authentication and role-based permissions for customers and staff. 3. Build REST endpoints for customers, staff availability, slots, and bookings with Pydantic validation. 4. Add booking-conflict handling via transactional checks. 5. Write unit tests and auto-generate OpenAPI docs. 6. Share regular updates and final codebase with documentation.
proposal.timeline: I can complete the full API build, tests, and docs in 18 days, with core endpoints and auth ready by day 10 and testing/docs finalized by day 18.
proposal.pricing: My fixed price is $1,300. This matches your budget and reflects focused delivery of secure, documented, multi-tenant FastAPI APIs with tests and migrations.

strengths: Clear alignment with client requirements and constraints
Specific relevant experience cited with concrete projects
Structured approach and realistic timeline
improvements: Include brief post-delivery support or handover note
Slightly tighten introduction to reduce repetition

proposal.introduction: Hi, I’m Kartik Bansal, an AI Product Engineer and full-stack developer. I understand you need a Node.js, Express, and MongoDB backend for your subscription e-commerce brand to manage products, orders, discount codes, inventory, and verified payment webhooks with clean docs and deployment notes. While my stack is often Python/FastAPI, I have built production-style REST APIs, order workflows, and backend systems (e.g., a turf booking platform with React, FastAPI, SQL and REST APIs) and can deliver the same reliability in Node.js.
proposal.relevantExperience: In the Smart Turf Booking Platform, I developed a full-stack system with REST APIs, booking workflow, and database management using React, FastAPI, and SQL—directly relevant to your order and inventory workflow needs. I also built an Analytics Dashboard with a Python backend and React frontend, showing my ability to structure backend services and API-driven data flows. My work follows modular architecture, thorough testing, and clear documentation, which matches your requirement for API docs and deployment notes.
proposal.approach: 1. Set up Node.js + Express server with MongoDB models for products, orders, discounts, inventory. 2. Build REST APIs for CRUD and order workflow with status tracking. 3. Implement discount code validation and inventory update logic on order events. 4. Add payment-provider webhook endpoint with signature verification and error handling. 5. Write API documentation and deployment notes (env, Docker, hosting). 6. Test flows and deliver codebase with README.
proposal.timeline: I can deliver the backend in 15 days, including 2 days for testing and docs, fitting your 16-day timeline.
proposal.pricing: My fixed price is $1,100, aligned with your budget, reflecting a focused build of a clean, documented, and deployable backend within the timeline.

strengths: Clear structured approach with numbered steps
Relevant experience described with concrete examples
Professional and confident tone throughout
improvements: Personalization could reference client's brand name or specific needs more directly
Primary stack is Python/FastAPI which may concern client needing Node.js specifically
No mention of post-delivery support or communication plan

proposal.introduction: Hi, I’m Kartik Bansal, an AI Product Engineer and full-stack developer. I understand you need a secure authentication and account-management module for an internal HR portal using Django, Django REST Framework, PostgreSQL, and JWT, with password resets, profiles, role-limited access, permission tests, and clear API docs. While my stack centers on FastAPI/React, I have strong backend API and dashboard experience—including a React/Python analytics dashboard with role-relevant data access—that maps well to structured API and account modules. I’m confident I can deliver this cleanly within your budget and timeline.
proposal.relevantExperience: In a previous Analytics Dashboard project, I built a React frontend consuming a Python analytics API with structured backend data access and KPI-based views. That work involved designing reusable components, connecting authenticated backend data, and delivering clear visual reporting. It strengthened my ability to design backend APIs, model user-facing data access, and document interfaces—directly useful for your HR portal’s profile, permission, and API documentation needs.
proposal.approach: 1. Set up Django + DRF with PostgreSQL and JWT authentication. 2. Build employee sign-in, profile, and password-reset APIs. 3. Implement role-based permissions for team data access. 4. Write permission and API tests. 5. Produce concise API documentation. 6. Deliver code with regular progress updates and final handover.
proposal.timeline: I can complete this in 12 days, aligning with your stated timeline and the module’s clear scope.
proposal.pricing: My fixed price is $850, matching your budget. It reflects the well-defined requirements, standard Django/DRF auth scope, and included tests and documentation.

strengths: Clear structure with intro, experience, approach, timeline, pricing
Honest about stack mismatch and translates experience well
Concrete plan and fixed budget alignment
improvements: Personalize more to HR portal specifics rather than generic dashboard
Address Django/DRF learning curve given FastAPI background
Soften tone around confidence given stack mismatch

proposal.introduction: Hello, I’m Kartik Bansal, an AI Product Engineer specializing in LLM-powered applications. I understand you need an AI assistant that generates factual recruitment outreach emails as structured JSON from role and candidate data, using Python, Gemini API, and FastAPI with schema-constrained outputs. With production experience building Gemini-integrated FastAPI services and prompt-engineered AI workflows, I’m well-positioned to deliver this efficiently within your 18-day timeline and budget.
proposal.relevantExperience: I built an AI-Powered Chatbot for customer support using Gemini API with a React → FastAPI → Gemini API architecture, where I designed prompts, developed backend APIs, and managed conversational AI responses. I also developed the AI Freelancer Proposal Assistant, a full-stack FastAPI + React/TypeScript app using Gemini API and layered architecture with SQLite and prompt engineering to generate structured, consistent content. Both projects demonstrate direct experience in Gemini API integration, FastAPI endpoint development, and prompt design for reliable, schema-friendly AI outputs.
proposal.approach: 1. Define a Pydantic JSON schema for outreach email structure and enforce it via Gemini API response constraints. 2. Build a FastAPI endpoint accepting role description and candidate profile, triggering a prompt-engineered Gemini call. 3. Implement error handling for API/validation failures with clear messages. 4. Write example prompts and setup documentation (README) for easy integration. 5. Test with sample inputs to ensure factual, consistent JSON output compatible with your workflow tool.
proposal.timeline: I can deliver the complete solution in 14–16 days, including development, testing, and documentation, comfortably within your 18-day window.
proposal.pricing: My fixed price is $1,400, matching your budget. This covers end-to-end development, schema design, FastAPI integration, prompt engineering, error handling, and setup docs based on directly relevant prior Gemini + FastAPI work.

strengths: Clear and structured introduction with relevant expertise
Directly relevant experience with Gemini API and FastAPI
Well-defined approach and realistic timeline within budget
improvements: Could reference specific client requirement details for more personalization
Add brief mention of post-delivery support or revisions

proposal.introduction: Hi, I’m Kartik Bansal, an AI Product Engineer specializing in full-stack AI development. I understand you need a retrieval-augmented customer-support chatbot for your SaaS company that answers billing and product questions from help-centre docs, cites sources, and routes uncertain queries to agents. With hands-on experience building LLM chatbots and RAG pipelines using Python, FastAPI, React, and Gemini API, I’m well-positioned to deliver this within your 28-day timeline and $2,200 budget.
proposal.relevantExperience: I built an AI-powered customer-support chatbot using Gemini API with a React → FastAPI → Gemini API architecture, handling natural language understanding and conversation management to reduce manual support effort. More directly, I developed an AI Freelancer Proposal Assistant with an end-to-end RAG pipeline: document ingestion, semantic retrieval via embeddings, and grounded generation using a modular FastAPI backend (service/repository patterns) and React/TypeScript UI. That project proved my ability to implement retrieval-augmented generation, cite contextual snippets, and design agent-style routing logic—exactly what your chatbot requires.
proposal.approach: 1. Ingest help-centre docs, chunk and embed them, store in a vector database. 2. Build a FastAPI conversation API using LangChain for retrieval and grounded generation with source citations. 3. Implement uncertainty detection to route low-confidence questions to a human agent. 4. Develop a simple React chat UI for end-user interaction. 5. Create evaluation examples to validate answer quality and citation accuracy. 6. Document the system and deliver with regular progress updates.
proposal.timeline: I can deliver the complete chatbot in 28 days, covering ingestion, RAG API, chat UI, agent routing, and evaluation examples within your stated timeline.
proposal.pricing: My fixed price is $2,200, matching your budget. This covers full RAG development, UI, API, evaluation, and documentation, reflecting the scope and my prior production-style AI build experience.

strengths: Clear alignment with client requirements and constraints
Relevant experience directly mapped to project needs
Structured approach and timeline provided
improvements: Add brief mention of testing or post-delivery support
Include specific vector database choice for more concreteness

proposal.introduction: Hello, I’m Kartik Bansal, an AI Product Engineer specializing in full-stack AI development. I understand your staffing agency needs an AI resume-analysis tool where recruiters upload PDF resumes and job descriptions to get structured skills, gaps, highlights, and screening questions. With production experience building LLM-powered tools using Python, FastAPI, and Gemini API, I can deliver a secure, reliable solution matching your requirements and 20-day timeline.
proposal.relevantExperience: I built an AI Freelancer Proposal Assistant, a full-stack AI SaaS that ingests job descriptions and generates structured proposals with Gap analysis and AI review using FastAPI, React, and Gemini API. That project used layered architecture, SQLite repositories, and RAG for contextual analysis—directly transferable to parsing resumes and comparing them to JDs. I also developed an AI-Powered Chatbot with Gemini API and FastAPI, proving my ability to integrate LLMs for structured NLP outputs and secure backend APIs.
proposal.approach: 1. Parse PDF resumes using Python PDF libraries with secure file handling and validation. 2. Design FastAPI backend with Pydantic models for structured JSON output. 3. Use Gemini API prompt engineering to extract skills, gaps, highlights, and screening questions from resume + JD. 4. Implement error handling and useful error messages for bad uploads. 5. Build a small test set with sample resumes and JDs to verify outputs. 6. Deliver modular code with documentation and basic review interface if needed.
proposal.timeline: I can deliver the complete tool in 18–20 days, including parsing, LLM integration, testing with your sample set, and final handover.
proposal.pricing: My fixed price is $1,500, aligned with your budget. It covers full development, secure PDF handling, LLM integration, test set, and documentation for a production-ready MVP.

strengths: Clear introduction with relevant expertise
Directly addresses client's staffing agency use case
Structured approach and timeline with fixed pricing
Good relevant experience examples
improvements: Add mention of post-delivery support or revisions
Specify how data privacy/security is ensured beyond 'secure handling'
Could briefly note scalability or future enhancements

proposal.introduction: Hi, I’m Kartik Bansal, an AI Product Engineer specializing in full-stack AI development. I understand your boutique agency needs a proposal-generation workflow where account managers submit client briefs and receive draft scope, approach, timeline, and pricing rationale for review. With production experience building AI proposal tools using Python, FastAPI, React, and Gemini API, I’m well-suited to deliver a clean, revision-ready system within your 21-day timeline and budget.
proposal.relevantExperience: I built an AI Freelancer Proposal Assistant, a full-stack AI SaaS that automated job analysis, proposal generation, pricing recommendations, and AI-based proposal review using FastAPI, React, TypeScript, and Gemini API. It included a multi-agent workflow, structured proposal management, revision editing, and history storage—directly matching your needs. I also developed an AI-Powered Chatbot with Gemini API and FastAPI, proving reliable LLM integration and prompt design for business workflows.
proposal.approach: 1. Design prompt templates for scope, approach, timeline, and pricing rationale using Gemini API. 2. Build a FastAPI backend that accepts briefs and returns structured proposal JSON. 3. Implement a revision workflow for account manager review and edits. 4. Add basic history storage with SQLite using repository pattern. 5. Write clear API documentation and deliver a simple React or minimal UI for briefing and review.
proposal.timeline: I can deliver the full workflow in 21 days: architecture and prompts (days 1–5), backend and JSON output (days 6–12), revision and history (days 13–17), docs and testing (days 18–21).
proposal.pricing: My fixed price is $1,600, aligned with your budget. It covers end-to-end development, Gemini API integration, revision workflow, history storage, and API docs, based on direct experience shipping similar AI proposal systems.

strengths: Clear alignment with client needs and timeline
Specific relevant experience with similar AI proposal tools
Well-structured approach and transparent pricing
improvements: Include brief note on post-delivery support or handover
Could personalize more with agency name or specific brief details

proposal.introduction: Hi, I’m Kartik Bansal, an AI Product Engineer with strong data analysis experience. I understand you need a 12-month sales and marketing analysis for your D2C brand covering revenue trends, product performance, repeat purchases, and campaign conversions, delivered as a reproducible notebook with CSV outputs. With my Python, SQL, and data visualization background, I can deliver clear, actionable insights within your 8-day timeline and $650 budget.
proposal.relevantExperience: I previously built a Financial Market Analytics Dashboard where I collected multi-source data, performed SQL analysis, and created Power BI dashboards with Python to surface KPIs and trends—directly relevant to your revenue and product performance needs. I also developed an Analytics Dashboard using React and Python that monitored business metrics and KPIs via visual reports, showing my ability to turn raw data into clear insights. Both projects involved centralized reporting and reproducible analysis workflows.
proposal.approach: 1. Clean and validate the 12-month sales/marketing data using Python, Pandas, and NumPy. 2. Perform cohort and repeat-purchase analysis plus campaign conversion tracking. 3. Generate revenue and product performance trends with Matplotlib charts. 4. Summarize insights in a written section within the notebook. 5. Export reproducible notebook and CSV outputs for leadership.
proposal.timeline: I can complete the full analysis and deliver the notebook plus CSVs in 8 days, with a mid-project checkpoint on day 4.
proposal.pricing: My fixed price is $650. This matches your budget and reflects focused, efficient delivery of a reproducible analysis with clear visualizations and insight summaries.

strengths: Clear alignment with client requirements and constraints
Relevant past experience described concretely
Well-structured approach and timeline
improvements: Personalize more by referencing specific brand or data context
Avoid generic phrasing like 'clear, actionable insights'
Briefly note limitations or assumptions about data format

proposal.introduction: Hi, I’m Kartik Bansal, an AI Product Engineer with strong data analytics experience. I understand you need executive Power BI dashboards for a regional retailer that turn Excel exports and SQL data into refresh-ready views of revenue, margin, inventory, and store performance, with filters and a stakeholder guide. My background in financial and business analytics dashboards makes me a strong fit to deliver this efficiently within your 12-day timeline.
proposal.relevantExperience: I built a Financial Market Analytics Dashboard using Python, SQL, and Power BI, integrating multiple data sources into automated reporting with KPI dashboards and trend analysis. I also developed an Analytics Dashboard with React and Python where I connected backend analytics data to visual reports for business metrics. These projects prove I can model SQL and Excel data, design executive views, and document transformation steps clearly for stakeholders.
proposal.approach: 1. Collect and review SQL and Excel data sources from the retailer. 2. Build a SQL-based data model and Power Query transformations for refresh-ready views. 3. Design Power BI dashboards for revenue, margin, inventory, and regional performance with date, category, and store filters. 4. Write a stakeholder user guide covering transformation steps and usage. 5. Validate dashboards with sample refreshes and deliver final files.
proposal.timeline: I can complete this in 12 days: days 1–3 data modelling, days 4–8 dashboard build, days 9–10 guide and docs, days 11–12 testing and handover.
proposal.pricing: My fixed price is $850. This matches your budget and reflects focused Power BI, SQL, and Excel work with documentation, based on my prior analytics dashboard delivery.

strengths: Clear alignment with client requirements and 12-day timeline
Specific relevant experience with Power BI, SQL, and Excel
Structured approach and transparent fixed pricing
improvements: Include client or retailer name for deeper personalization
Soften tone slightly to be more conversational
Mention post-delivery support or revision policy

proposal.introduction: Hi, I’m Kartik Bansal, an AI Product Engineer and full-stack developer with strong SQL expertise. I understand your subscription company’s customer-success team needs reliable SQL reports for active customers, churn, support volume, and renewal risk to plan weekly outreach. With hands-on experience building SQL-driven analytics for business reporting, I can deliver optimized, documented, export-ready queries using joins, CTEs, aggregations, and window functions within your 7-day timeline.
proposal.relevantExperience: In my Financial Market Analytics Dashboard project, I used Python, SQL, and Power BI to centralize financial data from multiple sources, performing SQL analysis to generate KPI dashboards and automated reporting—directly relevant to building clear, export-ready views. Also, as a frontend developer on an Analytics Dashboard, I connected React to a Python analytics API and worked with SQL-backed metrics for business KPIs. These experiences show I can structure cohort and monthly churn reporting and reliable customer-success views using advanced SQL.
proposal.approach: 1. Review your schema and define required report outputs (active, churn, support volume, renewal risk). 2. Write modular SQL using CTEs, joins, window functions for cohort and monthly churn. 3. Build optimized aggregation queries for support and renewal-risk views. 4. Document each query and format for export. 5. Validate outputs with sample data and deliver SQL files with notes.
proposal.timeline: I can complete all query development, documentation, and validation in 7 days as requested, with a mid-week checkpoint for feedback.
proposal.pricing: My fixed price is $550, matching your budget. This covers four report views, optimized and documented SQL, and export readiness based on the scoped 7-day effort.

strengths: Clear structure with defined sections
Relevant experience tied to client needs
Concrete 7-day approach and timeline
Professional and confident tone
improvements: Personalization could reference specific client context or company name
Add brief examples of past SQL reports or metrics delivered
Mention communication plan beyond mid-week checkpoint

proposal.introduction: Hi, I’m Kartik Bansal, an AI Product Engineer and full-stack developer with strong Python and data automation experience. I understand you need a repeatable, validated Python script using OpenPyXL to replace manual copying across Excel workbooks, with formula-safe updates, summary tabs, and clear instructions for a non-technical finance user. My background in building automated financial reporting solutions makes me a strong fit for this task.
proposal.relevantExperience: I previously developed a Financial Market Analytics Dashboard where I collected financial data, performed SQL analysis, and automated reporting using Python and Excel. That project improved visibility into financial performance through automated, repeatable reporting workflows. This experience directly prepares me to build a validated OpenPyXL script that safely updates summaries and generates ready-to-send reports without breaking formulas.
proposal.approach: 1. Review your current Excel workbooks to map inputs and required summaries. 2. Build a Python + OpenPyXL script with input validation and formula-safe update logic. 3. Generate summary tabs and a final ready-to-send report. 4. Write step-by-step instructions for non-technical users. 5. Test with sample data and deliver the script with documentation.
proposal.timeline: I can deliver the complete script, tested outputs, and user instructions within 6 days as requested.
proposal.pricing: My fixed price is $450, matching your budget. This covers scripting, validation, documentation, and testing for a reliable, repeatable reporting solution.

strengths: Clear structure with distinct sections
Direct alignment to client requirements (OpenPyXL, formula-safe, non-technical user)
Relevant past experience cited
Professional and confident tone
improvements: Personalization could reference specific client context or workbook details
No mention of post-delivery support or revisions
Pricing justification could be slightly more detailed

proposal.introduction: Hi, I’m Kartik Bansal, an AI Product Engineer and full-stack developer. I understand you need an interpretable ML model to predict customer churn from CSV data using Python, Pandas, and scikit-learn, with clear risk scoring and handover docs for your ops team. With strong Python and data analysis experience, including SQL-based analytics and dashboarding, I can deliver a clean, explainable churn model within your 15-day timeline and budget.
proposal.relevantExperience: In a Financial Market Analytics Dashboard project, I used Python and SQL to collect, clean, and analyze multi-source financial data, then built Power BI dashboards with clear business insights. That work sharpened my data cleaning, exploratory analysis, and translating raw CSV-style data into actionable outputs—directly relevant to your churn prediction and risk scoring needs, where interpretability for non-technical ops staff is key.
proposal.approach: 1. Load and clean CSVs (customers, subscriptions, payments, tickets) with Pandas. 2. Perform EDA to uncover churn patterns. 3. Engineer features (tenure, failed payments, ticket volume). 4. Train and evaluate scikit-learn models for interpretability (e.g., logistic regression, decision tree). 5. Output churn-risk scores per customer. 6. Deliver Jupyter notebook and handover documentation.
proposal.timeline: I can complete the full project in 12–15 days, including review and documentation handover.
proposal.pricing: My fixed price is $1,100, matching your budget. It covers data work, model building, scoring output, notebook, and clear docs for your operations team.

strengths: Clear structured approach with concrete steps
Relevant experience mapped to client needs
Professional and confident tone throughout
improvements: Personalize more by referencing specific client context or dataset details
Mention post-delivery support or model maintenance
Include brief note on interpretability methods (e.g., SHAP, feature importance)

proposal.introduction: Hi, I’m Kartik Bansal, an AI Product Engineer and full-stack developer. I understand you need a scheduled Python pipeline using Requests and BeautifulSoup to collect public product data (names, prices, ratings, availability), normalize it, and output analyst-ready CSV or SQLite with rate limiting, configurable rules, deduplication, logging, and clear run instructions. With strong Python, SQL, and SQLite experience building data-focused systems, I’m well-suited to deliver this reliably within your 10-day timeline and $700 budget.
proposal.relevantExperience: In my Financial Market Analytics Dashboard work, I used Python and SQL to collect, normalize, and analyze multi-source financial data, then automated reporting—directly relevant to building a clean, analyst-ready data pipeline. I also developed an Analytics Dashboard where a Python backend processed and served structured data to a frontend, showing my ability to design dependable extraction and data-handling logic. These projects demonstrate practical experience with Python-based data collection, SQLite-ready structuring, and automated output.
proposal.approach: 1. Define configurable extraction rules (selectors, fields) in a settings file for product name, price, rating, availability. 2. Build Python collectors using Requests + BeautifulSoup with rate limiting and retry/error handling. 3. Normalize and deduplicate records before saving to CSV or SQLite. 4. Implement structured logging and a scheduler (e.g., cron or Python scheduler). 5. Write clear README run instructions and test the pipeline end-to-end.
proposal.timeline: I can complete this in 10 days: days 1–3 setup and scraping core, days 4–6 normalization, SQLite/CSV, and deduplication, days 7–8 logging and scheduling, days 9–10 testing and documentation.
proposal.pricing: My fixed price is $700. This matches your budget and reflects a production-ready, well-documented pipeline with rate limiting, error handling, and analyst-ready output.

strengths: Clear structure with introduction, experience, approach, timeline, pricing
Directly addresses all stated requirements (rate limiting, deduplication, logging, etc.)
Reasonable timeline and budget alignment
Professional and confident tone
improvements: Personalization could include specific reference to client's context or named project
Relevant experience descriptions are generic and lack concrete metrics or links
No mention of communication plan or post-delivery support

proposal.introduction: Hi, I’m Kartik Bansal, an AI Product Engineer and full-stack developer. I understand you need a cross-platform mobile app for turf booking with REST API integration, JWT auth, calendar slot selection, and push-ready confirmations for Android and iOS. With my experience building full-stack booking systems and responsive apps, I’m confident I can deliver a clean, reliable solution within your 21-day timeline and $1,500 budget.
proposal.relevantExperience: I built a Smart Turf Booking Platform as a full-stack developer, solving manual scheduling conflicts for sports facilities. I designed the booking workflow, developed REST APIs with FastAPI, and built a responsive React frontend with SQL booking management. That project delivered a complete booking workflow and API integration, directly mirroring your need for slot browsing, bookings, and confirmations via an existing REST API.
proposal.approach: 1. Integrate your provided REST API with JWT authentication for secure login. 2. Build calendar-based slot selection using React Native for cross-platform coverage. 3.
